title: StreamSchema
description: Stream schema for media streaming properties

bitrate.description: current bitrate at the time of collection

duration.description: How long is the content (VOD only) (in ms)

fps.description: current frames per second at the time of collection

timestamp.description: current timestamp at the time of collection

watch_time.description: how much did the media progress since the last context update (in ms)

completion_percent.description: Percentage of amount of time watched relative to its total duration
